trackedDelta: No entries added or dropped (board saturated, all WATCH items still unconfirmed). failures: Non-blocking (ops, not agent fault): the norwegian-rights skill edit to add an Athletics/Diamond League section has been permission-blocked 4 runs running; runtime unaffected (events carry their own NRK streaming values), but the qualitative learning loop can't persist — grant the research workflow write access to .claude/skills/.

notes: Calm, focused run. coverage-audit (07:42) reports zero high/medium recall gaps and the board is well-covered; scout logged 'quiet' 21x over the last day. events.json CHANGES (eventsRemoved: 1): (1) TIGHTENED NM friidrett 2026 start time 2026-07-23T14:00Z -> 2026-07-23T11:00Z. Summary updated to disclose this and that exact per-discipline times are still image-only. Ventura: RE-VERIFIED unconfirmed. 3M Open (23-26 July, TPC Twin Cities) field still has him only as ALTERNATE, not main field; Corales Puntacana Championship (16-19 July) field not yet published. No addable event. Follow up when fields drop (Corales ~10 July, 3M ~17 July).

Ruud: RE-VERIFIED unconfirmed for the North American hardcourt swing. NOT on the DC Open entry list published 1 July (ATP 500, Washington 25 July-2 Aug). National Bank Open is in MONTREAL in 2026 (not Toronto), 1-13 Aug, draw ~31 July, entry list unpublished. Only Gstaad (13-19 July, on the board) confirmed. All injury-dependent.

Jakob Ingebrigtsen: comeback STILL UNCONFIRMED. Direct check of the Monaco Herculis start list confirms he is NOT entered (10 July). Agent says racing 'possible from mid-July' but no commitment; DL London (18 July) and Hungarian GP Budapest (14 July) are speculation only, no start-list confirmation. Deliberately NOT added. Re-check in 3-4 days.

Magnus Carlsen: no new July/early-Aug tournament (next remains Esports World Cup chess 11-15 Aug, on the board). 100 Thieves/rain: BLAST Bounty S2 online stage (21-26 July) bracket/group draw/map pool all TBD across Liquipedia/BLAST.tv/HLTV (drop 1-3 days before); no other 100T match before ~10 Aug. Both correctly left as-is.

TdF stage 4 (Tue 7 July, Carcassonne-Foix): running as planned (181.9 km) under a Code Red heat alert (~40-41C), UCI heat protocol on standby — no official modification. Aggregator start-time discrepancy: neutralized rollout ~13:10 CEST vs real start ~13:25 CEST (US sites show Eastern Time). Verify checks daily. F1 Belgian (19 July) + Hungarian (26 July) GPs and the WC semis/bronze/final all re-confirmed Sunday/evening slots, no change.
